product_overview: A single-page React + TypeScript portfolio that showcases branding, motion, and WebGL visuals to create an immersive personal site experience. It combines animated hero content, a sticky interactive navigation, an infinite logo marquee and a responsive 3D background with smooth scrolling.
core_goals: Present the user's branding and core message with a high-impact hero introduction.
Provide an immersive, interactive visual experience (3D background and animations) that responds to user input.
Surface client or partner logos in a continuous, attention-grabbing marquee to demonstrate credibility.
Keep navigation accessible while browsing and make it easy for visitors to express interest in contacting the owner.
Deliver a smooth, polished scrolling and section transition experience across the page.

features.name: Navigation
features.description: A sticky, interactive navigation bar that stays visible while browsing and provides lightweight interactive feedback to guide user actions and contact intent.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through the page -> Observe navigation bar remains visible (sticky) -> Hover over navigation links -> Notice interactive feedback (visual hover state) -> Indicate intent to contact (express interest to talk)

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: A high-impact hero area that introduces the brand and key message with entrance and idle animations to capture visitor attention on load.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load page -> See hero animations play on load -> Scroll down to reveal additional content

features.name: Logo Marquee
features.description: An infinite-scrolling marquee that showcases logos continuously and offers interaction effects when a visitor engages with it.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See logo marquee animating across the page -> Hover over the marquee -> Observe interaction effects on the logos -> Move mouse away -> See marquee resume

features.name: Interactive 3D Background
features.description: An immersive Three.js-based background that responds to pointer movement to increase engagement and depth on the landing page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load page -> Move the mouse across the viewport -> Observe 3D background respond to pointer movement -> Pause pointer movement -> Observe background return to idle motion

features.name: Smooth Scrolling
features.description: GSAP-powered scroll smoothing and tied animation timing that produce fluid scrolling and subtle parallax across sections.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Begin scrolling through the page -> Experience smooth, eased scrolling and coordinated section motion -> Stop scrolling -> Observe page rest state

features.name: Navigation
features.description: Sticky navigation bar with interactive elements

features.name: Interactive 3D Background
user_interactions: Move mouse to interact with background

features.name: Smooth Scrolling
features.description: GSAP ScrollSmoother integration for premium experience
